data.name: Sex Game - BDSM - Episode 3
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in an erotic visual novel that explores the bond between a submissive and her Master, paired with an interactive sex simulator.

GAME DESCRIPTION
Veronica and her Master continue exploring more kinky fetishes as she slowly discovers the amazing world of BDSM.
Their playroom is expanded with some new toys to play with.

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and renderings.
- HD renders and animations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
